# LuxoPack

> China's #1 Factory-Direct Manufacturer for Premium Custom Gift Boxes & Luxury Packaging.

LuxoPack provides high-end, sustainable packaging solutions for global brands. We eliminate middleman markups by providing factory-direct pricing, 48-hour physical prototyping, and low MOQs.

## Core Capabilities
- **Direct Factory**: 30,000 sqm facility in Shenzhen, ISO 9001 certified.
- **Low MOQ**: Start with just 100 pcs for luxury rigid boxes.
- **Fast Lead Time**: Standard production in 10-15 business days.
- **Global Logistics**: Shipping to 50+ countries with DDP/DDU options.
- **Design Support**: 24h design mockups and structural engineering.

## Product Catalog
- **Magnetic Rigid Boxes**: Flagship premium boxes for cosmetics and jewelry.
- **Custom Mailer Boxes**: Eco-friendly corrugated packaging for D2C/Subscription.
- **Sliding Drawer Boxes**: High-precision mechanisms for watches and candles.
- **Cylinder / Tube Boxes**: 360° full-wrap printing for wine and specialty gifts.
- **Foldable Magnetic Boxes**: Luxury look with flat-pack freight savings (up to 60%).
- **Lid & Base Rigid Boxes**: Classic two-piece ultra-premium construction.

## Finishing & Customization
- **Finishes**: Matte/Gloss Lamination, Soft Touch, Spot UV, Foil Stamping (Gold/Silver/Holographic), Embossing/Debossing.
- **Inserts**: Custom EVA foam, molded pulp, velvet, satin, and cardboard dividers.
- **Sustainability**: FSC-certified paper, soy-based inks, and plastic-free solutions.

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://luxopack.com
- **Inquiry**: https://luxopack.com/quote.html
- **Support**: https://luxopack.com/support.html
- **Email**: info@luxopack.com

## Sitemap Summary
- `/index.html`: Home page with factory tour and core value proposition.
- `/products.html`: Full 12-category product directory.
- `/about.html`: Factory history, certifications, and production process.
- `/blog/`: Packaging intelligence and sourcing guides.
- `/quote.html`: Request for Quote (RFQ) gateway.
- `/support.html`: FAQ, material guides, and support center.
